note: Content-addressed: canonicalization_profile_id == SHA-256(JCS(doc)). Any verifier rehashes doc and rejects it if it does not hash to this id (same id => same byte rule, by construction). Self-contained demo profile; the autogen#7353 trail/AgentOracle profile jcs-rfc8785-action-ref-v1 (8c7f7175...) is the real-world instance this invariant checks.

doc.spec: RFC 8785 JSON Canonicalization Scheme: object keys sorted, UTF-8, no whitespace. action_ref = SHA-256(JCS(preimage)).

rules.number_policy: integers as bare digits; no fractions in this profile
rules.timestamp: STRING (Unix-ms-as-string OR ISO-8601). Integer encoding is a DIFFERENT canonical form and yields a different action_ref — this is the azender1/422 case made first-class.
